findings.title: Model policy omitted normalization descriptor
findings.disposition: Added normalization to CONTROL_PLANE_EXPORT_MODEL_REGISTRY_IDENTIFIER_POLICY and made the validator assert model/contract normalization parity.

findings.title: S02 fixture layout-record cross-check depends on committed S01 layout fixture
findings.disposition: The RP00 validator checks fixtureExportModelRegistryLayout.registry_name and the S02 fixture matches_layout_record claim; final npm run rp00:control-plane:validate confirms the committed S01 binding remains intact.

findings.title: Weighted title disposition expected-status comparison not fully visible in diff
findings.disposition: The RP00 validator checks the S02 weighted title disposition and final validation confirms the aligned_with_weighted_ledger status is accepted.

findings.title: S02 evidence artifacts must exist before production_ready
findings.disposition: Evidence artifacts are materialized in the S02 evidence root and verified by npm run rp00:control-plane:validate.

findings.title: Run contract validator after evidence materialization
findings.disposition: Final validation runs npm run rp00:control-plane:validate after evidence materialization.

raw_review_summary: Claude approved the S02 primary identifier slice as scope-compliant: it implements only a canonical registry_id policy for ControlPlaneExportModelRegistry, uses stable emr_ lowercase snake-case IDs, exports the identifier policy and normalize/validate helpers, references S01 layout completion, defers tenant scope to RP00.P01.M09.S03, does not mutate states.js or the entity registry, uses no real data, writes no product state, and hands off to RP00.P01.M09.S03. No P0/P1/P2 findings were reported. P3-1 was fixed; P3-2/P3-3 are confirmed by validator; closeout blockers are resolved by evidence and final validation.
